_doc: Exceptions for the schema-contract check (scripts/check-schema-contract.mjs). Only add entries that are deliberately NOT in the shared DB tednluwflfhxyucgwigh — never to silence a real bug.
_crossInstanceTables_doc: Tables that live in EL v2 (yvnuayzslukamizrlhwb) or media (uaxhjzqrdotoahjnxmbj), queried via a non-shared client. Seeded from _schema-truth.md.
_ignoreFiles_doc: Path substrings of files that construct their own non-shared Supabase client.
_ignoreColumns_doc: table -> [columns] known false-positives (e.g. RPC-returned aliases the parser can't see). Document why for each.
